herbs.herb_desc: Acorus calamus powder, also known as sweet flag powder, is derived from the rhizome of the Acorus calamus plant and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The powder is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations. However, more research is needed to confirm the effectiveness and safety of Acorus calamus powder for medicinal purposes.
